name: Ceylon Premium Black Tea
description: A full-bodied tea grown in the misty highlands of Sri Lanka, carefully handpicked and perfectly balanced to deliver the classic Ceylon aroma and deep amber colour.

name: Golden Tips Ceylon Black Tea
description: A luxurious hand-rolled tea with golden tips. Limited harvest, celebrated for its smooth body, honeyed aroma, and golden liquor.

name: Pure Ceylon Green Tea
description: Delicate and refreshing, our Ceylon Green Tea is rich in antioxidants and offers a clean, grassy flavour with a subtle floral finish.

name: Jasmine Infused Green Tea
description: Premium Ceylon Green Tea infused with natural jasmine blossoms for a calming aroma and a delightfully smooth taste.

name: Ceylon Cinnamon Herbal Infusion
description: An invigorating blend of pure Ceylon cinnamon and natural herbs — caffeine-free, soothing, and packed with health benefits.

name: Lemongrass & Ginger Herbal Tea
description: A zesty, refreshing infusion that combines the uplifting notes of lemongrass and ginger, perfect for digestion and relaxation.

name: Private Label Black Tea Blend
description: We offer customized black tea blends with your own branding and packaging — tailored to your target market’s taste profile and packaging requirements.

name: Private Label Green Tea Collection
description: Tailored green tea selections crafted under your private label — offering Ceylon’s finest leaves with your packaging design.

name: Ceylon Iced Tea Range
description: Ready-to-brew iced tea made with real Ceylon leaves — refreshing, smooth, and naturally sweet. Perfect for warm climates.

name: Silver Tips White Tea
description: Rare and exquisite — our Silver Tips are handpicked buds dried under natural sunlight, producing a delicate and mellow flavour for true connoisseurs.
